conversations.say: Inez, I accept your offer for mutual defense. Let's align on what we share regarding the camera gap so neither of us takes the fall for routine building access.
conversations.offer: Complete details of the camera audit context and service exit rhythms
conversations.request: Coordination on our disclosure boundary to protect our uninvolved residents

conversations.say: Rafi, let's compare our shift records and service delivery notes to ensure our timeline of couriers and shift collectors remains accurate without inventing single identities.
conversations.offer: Building delivery schedules and shift-change observation notes
conversations.request: A consistent timeline of shift collectors and courier movements

conversations.say: Morgan, before I provide any bounded account of the service route, I need your explicit commitment to protect tenant anonymity and ensure fair treatment in your report.
conversations.offer: A bounded operational account of the camera audit context and access gaps
conversations.request: An explicit guarantee of fair treatment and protection of tenant anonymity

public_statement: The camera gap and automated access changes are separate physical events. Do not let anyone turn routine building maintenance into a murder story.

commitments.promise: Protect Dee and Rafi from absorbing sole blame for the service route access

goal_progress: Coordinated disclosure boundaries and accepted mutual defense with Inez.
Compared shift-change and delivery observations with Rafi.
Demanded fair treatment and resident protection from Morgan before releasing a bounded account.
reasoning_summary: As Dee Nowak, I focused on locking in mutual defense with Inez regarding building access, aligning records with Rafi, and holding Morgan to a fair treatment standard before sharing operational details.
